name: immigration_case
description: an immigration application status world; actions file, rfe, respond, decide

card.description: an immigration application status world; actions file, rfe, respond, decide

rules: A case starts not_filed; `file` is valid only then and moves it to filed (under review).
`rfe` is valid only on a filed case with no RFE outstanding; it requests evidence and marks one outstanding.
`respond` is valid only while an RFE is outstanding; it cures the RFE, adds evidence, and returns the case to review.
A case cannot be decided while an RFE is outstanding.
`decide` is valid only on a filed case under review; it approves if evidence_score >= 60, otherwise denies.
approved and denied are terminal; no action changes a decided case.
Each valid action advances days_elapsed by one; invalid actions leave the state unchanged.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action

    APPROVAL_BAR = 60
    FILE_SCORE = 50
    RFE_RESPONSE_SCORE = 30

    status = s.get("status", "not_filed")

    # Terminal states accept no further actions.
    if status in ("approved", "denied"):
        return s

    if name == "file":
        # A case can only be filed once, from the start.
        if status != "not_filed":
            return s
        s["status"] = "filed"
        s["evidence_score"] = s.get("evidence_score", 0) + FILE_SCORE
        s["days_elapsed"] = s.get("days_elapsed", 0) + 1
        return s

    if name == "rfe":
        # USCIS issues a Request for Evidence only on a case under review that
        # has no RFE already outstanding.
        if status != "filed" or s.get("rfe_outstanding", False):
            return s
        s["status"] = "rfe_issued"
        s["rfe_outstanding"] = True
        s["rfe_count"] = s.get("rfe_count", 0) + 1
        s["days_elapsed"] = s.get("days_elapsed", 0) + 1
        return s

    if name == "respond":
        # The applicant can only respond while an RFE is outstanding; doing so
        # cures it and strengthens the record, returning the case to review.
        if not s.get("rfe_outstanding", False):
            return s
        s["status"] = "filed"
        s["rfe_outstanding"] = False
        s["evidence_score"] = s.get("evidence_score", 0) + RFE_RESPONSE_SCORE
        s["days_elapsed"] = s.get("days_elapsed", 0) + 1
        return s

    if name == "decide":
        # Adjudication requires a filed case under review with no RFE pending.
        if status != "filed" or s.get("rfe_outstanding", False):
            return s
        approved = s.get("evidence_score", 0) >= APPROVAL_BAR
        s["status"] = "approved" if approved else "denied"
        s["decision"] = s["status"]
        s["days_elapsed"] = s.get("days_elapsed", 0) + 1
        return s

    # Unknown action / noop: world unchanged.
    return s

emit.report: Case status: {status} (decision: {decision}). Evidence score {evidence_score}/100 after {rfe_count} RFE(s); {days_elapsed} processing day(s) elapsed.
